business.name: ROCKERZZ GYMNASTICS ACADEMY
business.tagline: Train Like A Champion. Flip Higher.
business.subtext: Professional gymnastics training for all ages and skill levels — from tiny tots to competitive athletes. We build strength, discipline, and confidence.
business.address: Apollo Pharmacy Line, Deepthi Sreenagar Colony, Madinaguda, 2, RTC Colony Rd, Deepthisri Nagar, Miyapur, Hyderabad, Telangana — 500 049

hero.tagline: Train Like A Champion. Flip Higher.
hero.subtext: Professional gymnastics training for all ages and skill levels — from tiny tots to competitive athletes. We build strength, discipline, and confidence.

about.description: ROCKERZZ GYMNASTICS ACADEMY has grown into one of Hyderabad's most respected gymnastics training centres. We believe every child deserves world-class coaching — regardless of where they start.

classes.name: Tiny Tots
classes.description: A playful introduction to gymnastics for the youngest learners. Every session is designed to build confidence, improve coordination and make movement joyful through games and structured play.

classes.name: Beginners
classes.description: A structured foundation batch for children new to gymnastics. Students learn correct technique, safe falling, and build strength through progressive drills in a supportive group environment.

classes.name: Intermediate
classes.description: For students who have mastered the basics and are ready to progress to more dynamic skills. This batch covers advanced tumbling, apparatus work and the beginnings of routine building.

classes.name: Advanced & Competitive
classes.description: Intensive training for students targeting district, state and national-level competitions. Focus is on perfecting full routines, peak physical conditioning and competition mindset.

classes.name: Artistic Gymnastics
classes.description: A specialised programme covering all four women's artistic events — vault, uneven bars, balance beam and floor. Ideal for students with ambitions to compete at state and national level.

classes.name: Adult Fitness Gymnastics
classes.description: Designed for adults who want to improve flexibility, build core strength and experience the joy of gymnastics without any prior background. All fitness levels welcome.

testimonials.name: Sunita Pawar
testimonials.text: My daughter trained here for two years and the transformation is incredible. She went from shy and uncoordinated to performing at state level. The coaches are truly exceptional.

testimonials.name: Amit Kulkarni
testimonials.text: The Tiny Tots programme was the best decision for our 4-year-old. Priya Ma'am has such a patient way with little ones. Vedant looks forward to every single class.

testimonials.name: Neha Joshi
testimonials.text: I joined the adult fitness batch with zero gymnastics background. Six months in and my flexibility and core strength are the best they've ever been. Highly recommend!
